headline: DuPont Announces Regular Quarterly Dividend on Common Stock
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of sixty cents ($0.60) per share on the outstanding Common Stock of the Company (par value $0.01 per share) payable on September 15, 2026, to holders of record of said stock at the close of business on August 31, 2026.

headline: Chemours to pay $450M in first federal "forever chemicals" settlement
summary: Chemical maker Chemours allegedly discharged chemicals linked to cancer and other health conditions in three states.

raw.headline: Chemours to pay $450M in first federal "forever chemicals" settlement
raw.summary: Chemical maker Chemours allegedly discharged chemicals linked to cancer and other health conditions in three states.

headline: DuPont Launches Tyvek® APX™ in ASEAN Market
summary: DuPont (NYSE:DD) today announced it has launched Tyvek® APX™ in the ASEAN market at Thailand Safe@Work 2026 in Bangkok. Through the culmination of scientific research and customer collaboration, Tyvek® APX™ fabric is the most advanced form of Tyvek® material to date and provides outstanding levels of breathability without compromising protection or durability.
